purpose: Define the final GO/NO-GO checklist before requesting Paula approval to connect TyA/Cinepolis Level 2 sanitized operational preview to CX.data runtime DEV through a single controlled point.
scope: DEV preview only. Not production, not import, not Firestore write, not HR writeback, not payment execution.
requiredBeforeAskingPaulaGo: Level 2 payload exists and validates with zero hard fails
Bridge validates and remains not connected
Runtime switch gate validates and remains blocked unless explicitly requested
Touched file list is limited and documented
June is payment/liquidation control, not pending visits
Certifications already presented are preserved or review_required
Paula receives explicit GO request wording before any runtime change

singleConnectionPoint.alternative: one preloaded adapter before modules under explicit approval

paulaGoRequestMustInclude: Expected DEV URL or local preview mode
Confirmation that no production/import/payment/provider action will run
devRuntimeNoGoImmediate: Old database dump connected or copied
UI modules need changes to make data work
Shopper dedupe relies on visual name only
Certifications already presented are forced to retake without rule
June shown as pending visits instead of payment control
postSwitchDevSmokeRequired: CX.data exists and keeps same interface
Level indicator is visible or documented as preview
Visits shown are sanitized and source-safe
Certifications preserved are not requested again without rule
Liquidations show control/candidate state, not paid final

requirements: DEV runtime preview executed and smoke GO
